ami.description: The AMI ID used to launch the EC2 instance.

arn.description: The ARN of the EC2 instance.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone in which the EC2 instance is running.

host_id.description: The ID of the dedicated host the instance is running on, if applicable.

iam_instance_profile.description: The IAM instance profile ARN or name attached to the instance.

id.description: The ID of the EC2 instance.

instance_state.description: The state of the EC2 instance. For example, 'pending', 'running', 'shutting-down', 'terminated', 'stopping', 'stopped'.

instance_type.description: The instance type of the EC2 instance.

ipv6_addresses.description: A list of IPv6 addresses assigned to the instance's primary network interface.

key_name.description: The name of the key pair used to launch the instance.

placement_group.description: The name of the placement group the instance is in.

primary_network_interface_id.description: The ID of the primary network interface attached to the instance.

private_dns.description: The private DNS name assigned to the EC2 instance.

private_ip.description: The private IP address assigned to the EC2 instance.

public_dns.description: The public DNS name assigned to the EC2 instance, if applicable.

public_ip.description: The public IP address assigned to the EC2 instance, if applicable.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which the EC2 instance is running.

tags_all.description: A map of all tags assigned to the instance, including default tags.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of security group IDs associated with the EC2 instance.

capacity_reservation_preference.description: Specifies the Capacity Reservation preference. Can be 'open' or 'none'.

cpu_core_count.description: The number of CPU cores for the instance.

cpu_threads_per_core.description: The number of threads per CPU core.

enclave_enabled.description: Whether to enable Nitro Enclaves on the instance.

instance_ami.description: The AMI to use for the instance.

instance_availability_zone.description: The availability zone to launch the instance in.

instance_disable_api_stop.description: If true, enables EC2 Instance Stop Protection.

instance_disable_api_termination.description: If true, enables EC2 Instance Termination Protection.

instance_ebs_optimized.description: If true, the instance will be EBS-optimized.

instance_iam_profile.description: The IAM instance profile to associate with the instance.

instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior.description: Shutdown behavior for the instance. Can be 'stop' or 'terminate'.

instance_monitoring.description: If true, detailed monitoring is enabled on the instance.

instance_tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the instance.

instance_type.description: The instance type to use for the instance.

instance_user_data.description: The user data to provide when launching the instance. This is used for EKS node configuration.
instance_user_data.default:
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="//"

--//
Content-Type: application/node.eks.aws

---
apiVersion: node.eks.aws/v1alpha1
kind: NodeConfig
spec:
  cluster:
    apiServerEndpoint: https://C080494B575C8B184F9EC25E14EF9126.gr7.eu-north-1.eks.amazonaws.com
    certificateAuthority: 
    cidr: 172.20.0.0/16
    name: bb-eks-gitops
  kubelet:
    config:
      maxPods: 98
      clusterDNS:
      - 172.20.0.10
    flags:
    - "--node-labels=eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup-image=ami-011bf62e6a9f5a429,eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateVersion=1,eks.amazonaws.com/capacityType=ON_DEMAND,eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup=default,eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateId=lt-02cdfe144fef38cdc"

--//--

launch_template_name.description: The name of the launch template.

launch_template_version.description: The version of the launch template.

maintenance_auto_recovery.description: The recovery behavior in case of a failure. Can be 'default' or 'disabled'.

metadata_http_endpoint.description: Enables or disables the IMDSv1 endpoint. Can be 'enabled' or 'disabled'.

metadata_http_protocol_ipv6.description: Enables or disables the IPv6 endpoint for the instance metadata service. Can be 'enabled' or 'disabled'.

metadata_http_put_response_hop_limit.description: The desired HTTP PUT response hop limit for instance metadata requests.

metadata_http_tokens.description: Specifies if IMDSv2 is required. Can be 'optional' or 'required'.

metadata_instance_metadata_tags.description: Enables or disables access to instance tags from the instance metadata. Can be 'enabled' or 'disabled'.

private_dns_name_hostname_type.description: The type of hostname for DNS resolution. Can be 'ip-name' or 'resource-name'.

root_block_device_delete_on_termination.description: Whether the root block device will be deleted on instance termination.

root_block_device_encrypted.description: Whether the root block device should be encrypted.

root_block_device_iops.description: The amount of provisioned IOPS. This must be set with a volume_type of 'io1', 'io2' or 'gp3'.

root_block_device_tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the root block device.

root_block_device_throughput.description: The throughput to provision for a 'gp3' volume in MiB/s.

root_block_device_volume_size.description: The size of the root volume in gigabytes.

root_block_device_volume_type.description: The type of volume. Can be 'standard', 'gp2', 'gp3', 'io1', 'io2', 'sc1', or 'st1'.
